cross_scene_arcs.title: Defender and Mediator of Team Cohesion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe consistently acts to preserve team unity and counter external criticism, transitioning from defending Hellboy's behavior to maintaining composure under public scrutiny.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: positions himself as Hellboy's defender against Manning's skepticism
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: demonstrates restraint and control during public confrontation, reinforcing team solidarity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: team remains under public and institutional pressure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Investigator to Independent Actor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe evolves from a forensic investigator using sensory and analytical skills to a figure withholding critical information, signaling a shift from institutional loyalty to personal agenda.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: relies on observation and deduction to identify hidden threats
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: withholds the recovered gold piece from the team, indicating a break in transparency
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: motivation for secrecy and potential conflict with team objectives

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Involvement with Princess Nuala
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe becomes emotionally captivated by Princess Nuala, shifts allegiance to protect her, and experiences profound loss when she dies, marking a personal transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: struck by the Princess's beauty and initiates pursuit
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: holds her as she turns to dust, emotionally devastated
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to reconcile his feelings and the consequences of his attachment

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loss of Institutional Status and Departure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe transitions from a trusted BPRD member under scrutiny to a resigned agent, relinquishing his role after moments of vulnerability and dependence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: witnesses leadership changes and public rejection of the team
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: formally quits the BPRD and leaves with Hellboy and Liz
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: identity and purpose outside the agency

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reclamation and Assertion of Mythic Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy infiltrates the auction house to reclaim the Royal Crown of Bethmoora, asserting his mythic authority through violence and supernatural control, culminating in a sacrificial explosion to protect others while reinforcing his role as a mythic enforcer.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hellboy is ejected in an explosion after eliminating threats, having claimed the crown and asserted dominance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: true motive for targeting the crown remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Public Exposure and Institutional Rejection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Following a public battle, Hellboy transitions from covert operative to exposed figure, leading to media scrutiny and institutional demotion due to public backlash.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: demoted from team leader and publicly vilified as an 'ungodly freak'
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: public reaction and institutional response to exposure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Team Dynamics and Relational Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy's antagonism toward Johann evolves from mockery to physical violence, then shifts toward reluctant cooperation, reflecting a growing, if grudging, acceptance of non-traditional team roles.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: allows Johann to lead in unlocking Troll Market, despite prior conflict
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: conflict with Johann remains volatile and unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Isolation and Familial Reconnection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy moves from emotional neglect in his relationship with Liz, through shared grief with Abe, to embracing impending fatherhood, signaling a shift toward emotional openness and domestic aspirations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: ignores Liz's need for space and personal boundaries
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: reacts with joy to Liz's pregnancy and considers a domestic future
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to protect his family from supernatural threats

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting a Destructive Destiny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy survives a life-threatening injury and learns of his prophesied role as the destroyer of Earth, creating internal conflict between his identity as a protector and his fate as Anung-un-Rama, now complicated by the prospect of fatherhood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: injured survivor confronted with prophecy of Earth's destruction
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: acknowledges impending fatherhood while carrying the weight of a destructive destiny
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the conflict between his current identity and the prophecy that he will bring about Earth's destruction

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Resentment to Reconciliation: Liz and Hellboy's Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Liz's relationship with Hellboy evolves from strained domestic tension to deep emotional commitment, marked by moments of conflict, crisis, loyalty, and ultimately shared parenthood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Liz feels emotionally dismissed and disrespected in their shared living space.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Liz commits to building a family and future with Hellboy, envisioning a peaceful life together.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term impact of their supernatural identities on their child remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Embracing Power: Liz's Control Over Pyrokinesis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Liz moves from emotional volatility tied to her powers to full acceptance and controlled use of her pyrokinetic abilities in high-stakes situations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Liz's emotional distress manifests through uncontrolled pyrokinetic reactions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Liz wields her fire with precision and confidence, using it decisively in combat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Center Amid Public Hostility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Liz responds to public and institutional rejection by asserting moral clarity, resisting retaliation, and ultimately choosing loyalty to her team over the BPRD.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Liz feels alienated by public hatred and Hellboy's media presence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Liz leaves the BPRD, rejecting institutional authority to stand with her chosen family.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Public perception of the team remains hostile despite their sacrifices.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Grief to Vengeance: Response to Hellboy's Injury
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After Hellboy is gravely injured, Liz shifts from immediate emotional response to active pursuit of vengeance, then chooses to save him despite apocalyptic warnings.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Liz reacts in shock and grief to Hellboy's impalement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Liz defies fate to save Hellboy, accepting future consequences.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The foretold destruction linked to Hellboy's survival remains a looming threat.
